calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Aug-10-2016 Vacated

Motion To Dismiss For Failure To Prosecute Or To Maintain Current Address
Off Calendar Jul-15-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances.

The Court confirms the tentative ruling. DEFENDANT MV TRANSPORTATION, INC.'S Motion To Dismiss For Failure To Prosecute Or To Maintain Current Address is DENIED without prejudice to being refiled upon a fuller showing of diligence in making efforts to locate Mr. Shapiro. There is no indication that defendant or its counsel contacted Mr. Shapiro's prior counsel or St. Luke's in an effort to obtain current contact information for Mr. Shapiro.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Reporter: Reyes F. Hunter, CSR #6576, Bus. Tel: 530-339-5023. (D302)

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Feb-18-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Atty. STEVEN A. FABBRO, ESQ. of Law Offices of Steven A. Fabbro, Tel No. 415-391-6850 apearing for the moving parties;
No other appearances made in this matter.

The Court's tentative ruling required parties to appear at hearing. Matter discussed by Court and counsel. The Court orders as follows: STEVEN A. FABBRO, ESQ. AND LAW OFFICES OF STEVEN A. FABBRO'S MOTION TO BE RELIEVED AS COUNSEL FOR JAY SHAPIRO is granted. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976 (302/HK)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-07-2015 Set For Trial On Aug-15-16 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
